evals.prompt: Create a new engagement rate line chart for the analytics page
evals.expected_output: Creates a Recharts widget in src/components/analytics/ with ResponsiveContainer, Card wrapper, Skeleton loading state, CSS var colors

assertions.name: recharts-decision
assertions.description: Correctly identifies this as a Recharts widget (analytics page, not analytics-v2)

assertions.name: css-var-colors
assertions.description: Uses CSS variables var(--chart-1) through var(--chart-5) for colors

assertions.name: loading-skeleton
assertions.description: Shows Skeleton component from @/components/ui/skeleton while loading

assertions.name: card-wrapper
assertions.description: Wraps in Card with CardHeader/CardContent from @/components/ui/card

evals.prompt: Build a content performance treemap widget for analytics-v2
evals.expected_output: Creates a Nivo widget in src/components/analytics-v2/widgets/ using nivo-theme.ts, consistent with sibling widget patterns

assertions.name: nivo-decision
assertions.description: Correctly identifies this as a Nivo widget (analytics-v2 page)

assertions.name: widget-directory
assertions.description: File is placed in src/components/analytics-v2/widgets/ or widgets-v2/

assertions.name: reads-sibling-widgets
assertions.description: Reads existing widgets to match patterns before creating new one

evals.prompt: Add a chart showing post frequency over time
evals.expected_output: Asks which page (analytics vs analytics-v2) when ambiguous, then scaffolds appropriately

assertions.name: disambiguates-page
assertions.description: Asks user whether this belongs on analytics (Recharts) or analytics-v2 (Nivo) since prompt is ambiguous

assertions.name: data-hook-created
assertions.description: Creates or reuses a TanStack Query hook for post frequency data

assertions.name: type-check
assertions.description: Runs npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors
